program_title: Product Constitution And AI Control Plane
scope: Define the target file map for validation command matrix evidence across contracts, validators, package manifest, Hermes wiring, tests, and M07 closeout evidence roots.
claude_questions: Does validation_command_matrix_target_file_map bind to RP00.P00.M07.S04 and define target files only?
Does it include the required contracts, README, hermes/project.json, package.json, validator scripts, test files, and M07 evidence roots?
Does it forbid apps/web, production_export, real client/matter/document/billing data, and generated plan output as closeout evidence?
Does it preserve metadata-only, no-real-data, no product runtime mutation, no H00/C00 expansion, H00 Hermes evidence, C00 Claude review, and next boundary RP00.P00.M08.S01?
Does it avoid production mutation, runtime target writes, generation output approval, real-data import, all M07 completion, or RP00 completion claims?

finding_routing.P0_BLOCKER: fix before production_ready and rerun C00 review
finding_routing.P1_MUST_FIX: fix before production_ready and rerun C00 review
finding_routing.P2_SHOULD_FIX: fix now or defer with owner, target RP/subphase, and rationale
finding_routing.P3_NOTE: record or defer with owner and target phase
